item.title: 3 ways you can use Circle to Search to identify songs on any Android phone
item.itunes:title: 3 ways you can use Circle to Search to identify songs on any Android phone
item.itunes:author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.itunes:summary: Tired of using a third-party app or Gemini to recognize songs? You can do it in three ways using Circle to Search instead.
item.description: Tired of using a third-party app or Gemini to recognize songs? You can do it in three ways using Circle to Search instead.
item.content:encoded: Tired of using a third-party app or Gemini to recognize songs? You can do it in three ways using Circle to Search instead.

item.title: This secure email service just gave me a real reason to ditch Gmail

item.itunes:author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.itunes:summary: Proton Mail can now pull in Gmail emails and let users send messages from their Gmail address directly inside the app.
item.description: Proton Mail can now pull in Gmail emails and let users send messages from their Gmail address directly inside the app.
item.content:encoded: Proton Mail can now pull in Gmail emails and let users send messages from their Gmail address directly inside the app.

item.content:encoded: Samsung Wallet now lets Galaxy users use digital passports at TSA checkpoints at over 250 U.S. airports.

item.title: Motorola slid affiliate codes into your Amazon orders, now states this was 'unintended'
item.itunes:title: Motorola slid affiliate codes into your Amazon orders, now states this was 'unintended'
item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: Motorola was swiftly accused of hijacking the Amazon app and adding an affiliate link to users' orders, but officially states this was "unintended."
item.description: Motorola was swiftly accused of hijacking the Amazon app and adding an affiliate link to users' orders, but officially states this was "unintended."
item.content:encoded: Motorola was swiftly accused of hijacking the Amazon app and adding an affiliate link to users' orders, but officially states this was "unintended."

item.title: This handy Motorola feature lets me launch apps and start actions without touching the screen
item.itunes:title: This handy Motorola feature lets me launch apps and start actions without touching the screen
item.itunes:author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.itunes:summary: There's a Quick Launch feature on your Motorola phone that makes it easy to launch apps and features using only the back — here's how to use it.
item.description: There's a Quick Launch feature on your Motorola phone that makes it easy to launch apps and features using only the back — here's how to use it.
item.content:encoded: There's a Quick Launch feature on your Motorola phone that makes it easy to launch apps and features using only the back — here's how to use it.

item.title: These 3 tips help me make the most of my Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 cover screen
item.itunes:title: These 3 tips help me make the most of my Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 7 cover screen
item.itunes:author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.itunes:summary: For some reason, Samsung still hasn't given its users unrestricted access to the cover screen. You can reclaim functionality back with these Galaxy Z Flip 7 tips.
item.description: For some reason, Samsung still hasn't given its users unrestricted access to the cover screen. You can reclaim functionality back with these Galaxy Z Flip 7 tips.
item.content:encoded: For some reason, Samsung still hasn't given its users unrestricted access to the cover screen. You can reclaim functionality back with these Galaxy Z Flip 7 tips.

item.title: Which 2026 Motorola Razr model should you buy?
item.itunes:title: Which 2026 Motorola Razr model should you buy?
item.itunes:author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.itunes:summary: Motorola added a Razr Fold to its lineup of Razr flips for 2026, and this is who each model is right for. Here are all the differences and how to choose.
item.description: Motorola added a Razr Fold to its lineup of Razr flips for 2026, and this is who each model is right for. Here are all the differences and how to choose.
item.content:encoded: Motorola added a Razr Fold to its lineup of Razr flips for 2026, and this is who each model is right for. Here are all the differences and how to choose.

item.title: Gemini for Home expands: Google opens access to carriers and hardware makers
item.itunes:title: Gemini for Home expands: Google opens access to carriers and hardware makers
item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: Google's Gemini expanded to more developers, companies, service providers, and more, as it looks to break open access to other device makers.
item.description: Google's Gemini expanded to more developers, companies, service providers, and more, as it looks to break open access to other device makers.
item.content:encoded: Google's Gemini expanded to more developers, companies, service providers, and more, as it looks to break open access to other device makers.

item.title: Treat your ears to $150 OFF for these high-quality noise cancelling headphones at Best Buy
item.itunes:title: Treat your ears to $150 OFF for these high-quality noise cancelling headphones at Best Buy
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: Memorial Day Weekend is almost here, and buyers can save $150 on the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones.
item.description: Memorial Day Weekend is almost here, and buyers can save $150 on the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones.
item.content:encoded: Memorial Day Weekend is almost here, and buyers can save $150 on the Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones.
